testsuite.name: POMCrmLogin.ContactsTest

testcase.name: ContactSupportStartAndEndDate
testcase.system-out: ContactSupportStartAndEndDate:Test Execution Started ContactSupportStartAndEndDate:Test Execution Success

testcase.name: contactslastname
testcase.system-out: contactslastname:Test Execution Started contactslastname:Test Execution Success

testcase.name: CreateContactUsingOrganizationName
testcase.system-out: CreateContactUsingOrganizationName:Test Execution Started CreateContactUsingOrganizationName:Test Execution Success

testsuite.system-out: Suite Excecution Started-Report Configuration connecting to database configure Parellel Exe close config of parellel exe launching the Browser login to VTIGER ContactSupportStartAndEndDate:Test Execution Started ContactSupportStartAndEndDate:Test Execution Success logout from VTIGER login to VTIGER CreateContactUsingOrganizationName:Test Execution Started CreateContactUsingOrganizationName:Test Execution Success logout from VTIGER login to VTIGER contactslastname:Test Execution Started contactslastname:Test Execution Success logout from VTIGER closing the browser disconnecting with database
